en: Oh, no.
Oh, great plan so far. Oh, my God.
ko: 아, 지금까지는 좋은 계획이야. 오, 세상에.

en: Louis, get Becky.
If we don't know the code, this is going to turn into an alarm in 60 seconds.
ko: 코드가 없으면 60초 후에 알람이 울릴 거야.

en: Becky, put Jules on.
She put me on hold. What is wrong with that girl?
ko: 그녀가 나를 대기 상태로 두었어. 그 여자 뭐가 문제야?

en: This is so not good. What are we supposed to do, Ben?
ko: 이건 정말 안 좋아. 우리는 어떻게 해야 해, 벤?

en: Stop eating. Go look for the computer.
Right now. Go, go, go.
Go. Separately. Separately.
Ben, Ben, you there?
Becky, don't screw around. Put Jules on. It's an emergency.
ko: 베키, 장난치지 마. 줄스를 바꿔줘. 긴급 상황이야.

en: She's eating.
Interrupt her.
Ben, what's up?
Jules, your mother has an alarm.
ko: 줄스, 네 엄마가 알람이 울리고 있어.

en: No, she doesn't.
Yes, she does. I'm in her kitchen. It's about to go off. What's the code?
ko: 응, 울리고 있어. 나는 그녀의 주방에 있어. 곧 울릴 거야. 코드가 뭐야?

en: I have no idea. Ben, listen to me.
ko: 전혀 몰라. 벤, 내 말을 들어.

en: I know this woman. That is a fake alarm
ko: 나는 이 여자를 알아. 그건 가짜 알람이야

en: that she bought off of some infomercial or something, okay?
It's not real. It's not connected. It's just a scare-off burglar.
ko: 진짜가 아니야. 연결되어 있지 않아. 그냥 도둑을 쫓아내는 거야.

en: She says it's fake. It's just a scare-off burglar.
ko: 그녀가 가짜라고 해. 그냥 도둑을 쫓아내는 거야.

en: Oh, well, it's doing a good job.
Listen, my parents would never pay for an alarm, okay?
ko: 들어봐, 내 부모님은 절대 알람에 돈을 쓰지 않아, 알겠어?

en: They're the cheapest people in America.
Okay, well, it hasn't turned into an alarm yet.
It's still beeping.
That's because it's a fake. Trust me on this one.
Have you found the computer?
It's not down here.
